jobs.title: Software Engineer Expert - R&D
jobs.description:
Software Engineer Expert - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI).

## Software Engineer Expert - R&D
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                No
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Switzerland, Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards.
- Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a 
core requirement for geometric processing in EDM software.
- Interface with Real-Time & PLC teams to define, validate, and improve new functionalities.
- Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews.
- Participate in technical workshops, cross-team validations, and support knowledge-sharing across engineering teams.

Your profile 

- Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field.
- Proven experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years.
- Strong background in Object-Oriented architecture, UML, and OO programming (C# / .NET); experience in HMI 
development (WPF / XAML).
- Good understanding of the full software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies.
- Structured, autonomous, and collaborative working style; customer-oriented and resilient under pressure.
- Fluent in English and Italian.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities 

Your contact

Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1
6616 Losone
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

jobs.title: Software PLC Engineer - R&D
jobs.description:
Software PLC Engineer - R&D — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI).

## Software PLC Engineer - R&D
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                No
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Switzerland, Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Participate in the analysis of project needs and contribute to the definition of software requirements, including 
inputs from Market, Production, and R&D.
- Collaborate with HMI, process control, mechanical, and electrical teams to define specifications for complex PLC and 
real-time software components.
- Develop, test, and optimize PLC and real-time software applications to meet functional and performance requirements.
- Maintain and update technical documentation and software specifications throughout the development lifecycle.
- Support fast prototyping activities and contribute to sprint planning in collaboration with the Software Component 
Owners.

Your profile 

- Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Automation Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Electronic Engineering.
- At least 1 year of experience in PLC and/or real-time software development (e.g., C, C++, Structured Text).
- Experience with simulation and modeling tools (e.g., Matlab/Simulink).
- Basic knowledge of analog and digital electronics.
- Experience in the machine tools industry and ISO programming is a plus.
- Fluent in Italian. English level B2 or higher.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities 

Your contact

Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1
6616 Losone
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

jobs.title: Metrology Technician
jobs.description:
Metrology Technician — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Losone (TI).

## Metrology Technician
AGIE Charmilles SA
                        

                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            AGIE Charmilles SA, Switzerland, Losone

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            
                                        
                                    
                                

                                
                                  
                                  
                                      

                                      
                                        None Angestellte (Schweiz) 

                                        None Angestellte (global)
                                      

                                  
                                  
                                

                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Temporaneo:
                                            
                                                No
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                            Carico di lavoro:
                                            100%
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Switzerland, Losone
                                    
                                    Lingua:en
                                
                                
                                    
                                        
                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring 
accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards.
- Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments 
(Calypso, Quindos).
- Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO 
GPS standards.
- Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R&D to 
ensure robust inspection processes.
- Manage and continuously improve inspection-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup.

Your profile 

- Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background.
- At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD&T 
certification is a plus.
- Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards.
- Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills.
- Fluent in Italian; English B1.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose "We are a sustainability and innovation leader providing superior customer value" is our 
vision and this is what guides us. Our purpose "becoming better every day - since 1802" is what inspires us in our 
daily work. Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a 
sustainable future together. Excellent learning tools Great career opportunities 

Your contact

Giulia MollarHR Business Partner +41 91 806 90 30 Web E-Mail Via Zandone 1
6616 Losone
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro

AGIE Charmilles SA

                                    Your tasks 

- Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring 
accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards.
- Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments 
(Calypso, Quindos).
- Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO 
GPS standards.
- Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R&D to 
ensure robust inspection processes.
- Manage and continuously improve inspection-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup.

Your profile 

- Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background.
- At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD&T 
certification is a plus.
- Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards.
- Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills.
- Fluent in Italian; English B1.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose "We are a sustainability and innovation leader providing superior customer value" is our 
vision and this is what guides us. Our purpose "becoming better every day - since 1802" is what inspires us in our 
daily work. Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a

                                    SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer
SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer
Switzerland, Meyrin (GE) or Losone (TI)
United Machining is seeking an experienced SAP ABAP / Fiori Developer to design, develop, maintain custom SAP 
solutions and user-centric applications using SAP Fiori/UI5 framework.
The ideal candidate will bridge the gap between business requirements and technical solutions, creating intuitive 
interfaces that enhance user experience across our SAP landscape.
Ready to join?
Your tasks
Develop, enhance, and maintain SAP ABAP programs, reports, interfaces, conversions, enhancements and printout forms
Design and develop SAP Fiori applications using SAPUI5 framework, including transactional, analytical, and fact sheet 
apps
Build custom Fiori apps and extend standard Fiori applications to meet specific business requirements
Develop OData services using SAP Gateway and integrate with backend SAP systems (ECC, S/4HANA)
Configure and customize SAP Fiori Launchpad, including tile creation, role assignment, and theme customization
Create technical specifications based on functional requirements
Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization
Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for all developments and customizations
Collaborate with functional consultants and business stakeholders
Your profile
5+ years of hands-on SAP ABAP development (OO, BAPIs, BADIs, User Exits, WebDynpro) and solid experience in both ECC 
and S/4HANA environments.
Proven expertise in SAP Fiori/UI5 development, including OData service creation and SAP Gateway integration.
Comfort with core SAP development tools and technologies such as SE80/SE11, ALV, Forms (SmartForms/Adobe), CDS Views, 
REST APIs, and Web IDE/BAS.
Ability to understand business processes (FI/CO, MM/SD, PP/QM) and translate requirements into reliable, maintainable 
technical solutions.
Familiarity with integration concepts (IDoc, ALE, EDI) and ideally with SAP PI/PO, CPI, or CAP for cloud-native 
extensions.
Self-driven, detail-oriented developer who learns quickly, collaborates well, and maintains high-quality code and 
documentation.
Benefits
Clear vision and purpose
Sustainability and innovation focus
We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together.
Excellent learning tools
We provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized 
courses.
Great career opportunities
United machining as a global acting company provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a 
dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep@GF) to boost your career.
Your contact
Fanny Brault
HR Manager
Write an email
Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8
1217 Meyrin
Switzerland
Who we are
United Machining is the world’s leading provider of machine tools, diverse technical solutions and services to 
manufacturers of precision molds and tooling and of tight-tolerance, precision-machined components. The key segments we 
serve include the aerospace, automotive, medical, energy, information and communications technology (ICT) and 
electronics industries jid3751323x jit0314x jiy26x

AGIE Charmilles SA

                                            Inserzione originale / Candidarsi

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Homepage
                                        
                                    
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                
                                    Your tasks 

- Strategic HR business partnering: act as trusted advisor to HR and business leaders, translating business needs into 
efficient HR system solutions.
- SAP HR functional ownership: lead SAP HR modules (payroll, time management, organizational management, personnel 
administration), ensuring system stability, compliance, and continuous improvement.
- Integration & satellite systems management: oversee HR satellite systems and interfaces, coordinating with IT and 
vendors to ensure seamless data flows.
- Project & change management: lead and contribute to HR IT projects, managing cross-functional teams, communication, 
training, and documentation.
- Process optimization & data quality: drive continuous improvement of HR processes, efficiency, data accuracy, and 
user experience.
- Governance & vendor management: manage external providers, monitor SLAs, support budgeting, and contribute to HR 
systems roadmap and technology decisions.

Your profile 

- Strong SAP HR expertise: solid experience with SAP HR, especially organizational management, master data, Swiss 
payroll and time management.
- HR systems & integration experience: proven experience managing system integrations and hybrid IT landscapes.
- Functional & technical capability: ability to write functional specifications, validate technical designs, and 
ensure data quality and compliance.
- Strong HR process knowledge: deep understanding of HR business processes and operational realities.
- Consulting & analytical mindset: ability to translate business needs into solutions and proactively drive 
improvements.
- Project & change experience: experience contributing to HR IT, transformation and change management projects.
- Stakeholder & vendor management: excellent communication skills and ability to manage internal and external partners.
- International & complex environments: proven experience working in cross-functional, multinational contexts.
- Delivery-oriented team player: resilient, motivated by challenges, and passionate about building robust HCM systems.
- Education & experience: bachelor’s degree in a relevant field with 5+ years of experience in HR IT, HR systems, or 
SAP HR consulting.

Benefits

Clear vision and purpose Sustainability and innovation focus We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's 
work towards a sustainable future together. Excellent learning tools We provide development opportunities for everyone. 
We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Great career opportunities As a global 
acting company we provide many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management 
process to boost your career. 

Your contact

Fanny BraultHR Manager Web E-Mail Rue du Pré-de-la-Fontaine 8
1217 Meyrin
Switzerland View larger map

Your work route

Apply now

Who we are

United Machining is the world’s leading provider of machine tools, diverse technical solutions and services to 
manufacturers of precision molds and tooling and of tight-tolerance, precision-machined components. The key segments we 
serve include the aerospace, automotive, medical, energy, information and communications technology (ICT) and 
electronics industries

                                

            
            
            
                            

                        

                    
                    
                        Indietro
